scope.purpose: Explain the smallest meaningful business or delivery outcome this plan implements.
inScope: The slice-scoped work this plan delivers.
outOfScope: Closely related work that must stay out of this feature.
constraints: Key non-negotiable constraints copied from the locked request or story.

sharedRules.rule: Reuse the existing validation error contract and do not invent a feature-local variant.

sharedDecisions.title: Keep external payload details in the story
sharedDecisions.decision: Reference story External Contracts instead of duplicating request and response payload details in the plan.
sharedDecisions.rationale: The story is the single source of truth for external contracts, so the plan stays slice-first and easier to revise.

slices.title: REST boundary and orchestration mapping
slices.goal: Add the endpoint boundary and map it onto the orchestration input without leaking transport concerns deeper into the stack.
sliceRules: Treat an omitted request body the same as an empty filter object.

notes: Use story External Contracts as the source of truth for wire-level request and response expectations.

compositionNotes: This slice is a single orchestration call with no cross-provider composition.

units.purpose: Expose the endpoint and map the transport request into orchestration input.
units.change: Add the endpoint method, keep validation at the boundary, and translate omitted inputs into the expected orchestration defaults.
contractDetails: Preserve the existing validation error field names exactly.

tests.notes: Cover omitted body, validation failure, and happy-path response mapping.

units.loggingNotes: Log the effective filter summary and result count without dumping raw payloads.

units.purpose: Represent the normalized orchestration input for the new endpoint.
units.change: Default optional collections, keep the type immutable, and expose only orchestration-facing fields.

doneWhen: The endpoint exists and omitted input is normalized correctly.
The owned unit and integration tests planned for the slice pass.

notes: Signoff requires fresh PASS evidence for finalCheck and karate.
